name: Frog Town Rifa
description: Varrio Frog Town Rifa (VFTR), also known as Frogtown 13, is a Latino Sureño street gang based in the Elysian Valley (Frogtown) neighborhood of Northeast Los Angeles along the Los Angeles River. They were part of a Mexican Mafia-orchestrated coalition of three Northeast LA gangs targeted in a 2016 federal RICO indictment for drug trafficking and tax collection from narcotics dealers.
